programs.title: Kangaroo Beach
programs.desc: Frizzy's Treasure Hunt: While scuba diving over the reef, Frizzy swims off from her buddy Big Trev in search of hidden treasure and becomes lost underwater.

programs.title: Ariel
programs.desc: Triton accidentally turns into a kid.

programs.title: The Octonauts
programs.desc: The Octonauts must get two mantis shrimp to stop fighting before their powerful claw strikes destroy the Octopod.

programs.title: Bluey Fancy Restaurant
programs.desc: Scarlett and Parker create a birthday-themed restaurant for their parents' first date night since baby Bobbie.

programs.title: Play School: Rainforest Rangers
programs.desc: Rangers Zindzi and Takaya explore all the fascinating plants you find in the rainforest! They create a rainforest terrarium, make a yummy avocado snack, and find out how different rainforest plants live and grow together!

programs.title: Fireman Sam
programs.desc: When Charlie takes the kids on a sailing lesson, he feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. As Charlie tries to win back the kids’ attention, he ends up sinking the boat. / Fireman Sam and the rest of the team are training Mike Flood and Charlie Jones to be reserve firemen and Station Officer Steele is very pleased with their progress.
